title: Thelypteris boninensis
taxonomy: Thelypteris boninensis belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae and is classified as a species of fern. It is a member of the genus Thelypteris, which is a group of ferns commonly known as the lady ferns. The Thelypteris genus is part of the larger order Blechnales, which comprises a diverse group of ferns. At the kingdom level, Thelypteris boninensis is classified as a plant, specifically a vascular plant. Its classification is further supported by its characteristics and morphology, which align with those of other members of the Thelypteridaceae family.
